key_directories.notes: Task, flow, feature-flag, org-shape, and project configuration source. Regenerate CCI references after edits.
Scratch org definition JSON and setup defaults.
Metadata deployed during prepare_rlm_org step 5; profile/object safety rules apply.
Fields, settings, permission set groups, and decision tables that must deploy before core data.
Post-load metadata bundles; use feature and edition guards in cumulusci.yml where applicable.
Generated by UX assembly/retrieve flows only; never hand edit.
Edit templates instead of generated unpackaged/post_ux output.
export.json and CSV data plans; validate with scripts/validate_sfdmu_v5_datasets.py.
Context Service export/import plan data.
Constraint model/rule data.
Tooling metadata snapshots.
Post-load and cleanup scripts; keep bulk-safe.
query_erd, generate_cci_reference, and skill manifest helpers.
CML export/import/validation utilities.
Schema validation, diffing, cleanup, HTML generation, and schema_diff tools.
Reusable SOQL query files.
Use org_config.username for sf CLI and access_token only for REST API calls.
Repository-level integration checks.
Setup and end-to-end UI/API tests.
Scratch org definition JSON; review carefully for unintended branch churn.
Manual/API testing artifacts.
Use lower-kebab-case filenames under docs/.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not edit generated UX output directly.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: Never hand edit unpackaged/post_ux/; edit templates/ and run the assembler or drift flows.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not add layoutAssignment or applicationVisibilities to force-app profiles.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: Use templates/profiles/ for those profile concerns.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not add actionOverrides object metadata to force-app.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: Object metadata with actionOverrides belongs under templates/objects/.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not switch Upsert to destructive Insert plus deleteOldData without explicit approval.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: Explain the relevant SFDMU v5 bug, confirm no direct-field externalId alternative, then get user approval.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not pass access_token to sf CLI commands.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: Use org_config.username as --target-org for CLI; use access_token plus instance_url only for REST API.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not add EmailTemplatePage flexipages to templates/flexipages/.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: They cannot deploy via Metadata API.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not commit real emails in rlm.network-meta.xml.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: Use the repository placeholder; patch/revert tasks handle deploy-time substitution.

high_risk_safety_constraints.summary: Do not commit or push directly to main.
high_risk_safety_constraints.details: All changes must go through a feature branch and pull request; never push or force-push main without explicit approval.

external_systems.name: CumulusCI
external_systems.notes: CCI aliases use --org <cci_alias>; do not confuse with sf CLI aliases.

external_systems.name: SFDMU v5
external_systems.purpose: Salesforce data import/export via sf sfdmu run
external_systems.notes: Use semicolon-delimited externalId values and validate known v5 bug workarounds.

external_systems.name: PMOS skill manifest
external_systems.purpose: Cross-repo skill resolution for PMOS integration
external_systems.notes: Validate with python scripts/ai/skill_manifest.py --check when using cross-repo skills.

forbidden_write_locations.reason: Generated UX output; edit templates/ and regenerate instead.
Do not add layoutAssignment or applicationVisibilities; use templates/profiles/.
Do not add actionOverrides object metadata; use templates/objects/.
EmailTemplatePage flexipages cannot deploy via Metadata API.
Do not commit real emails; keep placeholder values.

last_successful_optimization_run.notes: Created deterministic project memory, project map, and schema from AGENTS.md and repository configuration.

unresolved_recommendations.summary: Add project-memory schema validation to CI or pre-merge checks.
unresolved_recommendations.rationale: Future memory edits should be machine-validated before merge.

unresolved_recommendations.summary: Refresh generated-reference timestamps after each cumulusci.yml regeneration.
unresolved_recommendations.rationale: The memory should indicate whether CCI task, flow, and feature-flag references are fresh.

unresolved_recommendations.summary: Record the exact optimization-run command once an automated optimizer exists.
unresolved_recommendations.rationale: The current bootstrap records the date and type; a future automated run should add command, version, and result metadata.
